author: valleytheknight
description: Map a local vault file (image, font, anything) to a CSS custom property, so any theme or snippet can reference your own local files with var(). - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: chrisairbrown-del
releases.description: Initial release. Map a vault file to a CSS custom property, so any theme or snippet can reference a local image, font, or other asset with var(). See README for usage and what it's for.
